name: smoking-status-field
title: Smoking Status Field
description: Structured never/former/current smoking status with pack-years and quit date.

props.name: value / defaultValue
props.type: { status: "never" | "former" | "current"; cigsPerDay: number | null; years: number | null; quitDate?: string }

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires on any change with the structured status.

clinicalNotes: Model smoking as structured status + quantity, not free text — "social smoker" is unquantifiable downstream. Pack-years (cigs/day ÷ 20 × years) drives screening eligibility, so the computed value and its inputs are both shown. Former smokers keep a quit date; selecting "never" clears the quantity and quit fields so no stale data lingers.
notes: Round-2 form component; composes radio-group + input + date-field + field + label.
